---
title: "`r params$title`"
author: "`r params$author`"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
    code_folding: hide
params:
  task: NULL
  ai_sections: NULL
  cross_sectional: NULL
  title: "AI-Powered Event Study Report"
  author: ""
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width = 10,
  fig.height = 6
)
library(EventStudy)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

task <- params$task
ai <- params$ai_sections
is_panel <- inherits(task, "PanelEventStudyTask")
```

```{r check-task, results='asis'}
if (is.null(task)) {
  cat("**Error:** No task object provided.\n")
  knitr::knit_exit()
}
if (is.null(ai)) {
  cat("**Error:** No AI sections provided.\n")
  knitr::knit_exit()
}
```

## Executive Summary {.ai-section}

```{r executive-summary, results='asis'}
if (!is.null(ai$executive_summary)) {
  cat(ai$executive_summary)
} else {
  cat("*Executive summary not generated.*")
}
```

## Study Overview

```{r study-overview, results='asis'}
if (!is_panel) {
  n_events <- nrow(task$data_tbl)
  groups <- unique(task$data_tbl$group)
  cat(sprintf("- **Study Type:** Classical Event Study\n"))
  cat(sprintf("- **Number of Events:** %d\n", n_events))
  cat(sprintf("- **Groups:** %s\n", paste(groups, collapse = ", ")))
  cat(sprintf("- **Firms:** %d\n", length(unique(task$data_tbl$firm_symbol))))
} else {
  cat("- **Study Type:** Panel Event Study (DiD)\n")
}
```

```{r event-table}
if (!is_panel && !is.null(task$data_tbl)) {
  event_summary <- task$data_tbl %>%
    select(event_id, group, firm_symbol)
  knitr::kable(head(event_summary, 15),
               caption = "Events (first 15)")
}
```

## Event Study Results

### Abnormal Returns

```{r ar-plot, fig.cap="Cumulative Abnormal Returns"}
tryCatch({
  p <- EventStudy::plot_event_study(task)
  print(p)
}, error = function(e) {
  cat("*Could not generate event study plot.*\n\n")
})
```

### AAR/CAAR Tables

```{r aar-caar-tables, results='asis'}
if (!is.null(task$aar_caar_tbl)) {
  stat_names <- setdiff(names(task$aar_caar_tbl),
                         c("group", "data", "model"))

  for (sn in stat_names) {
    cat(sprintf("\n#### %s\n\n", sn))
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(task$aar_caar_tbl))) {
      grp <- task$aar_caar_tbl$group[i]
      stat_tbl <- task$aar_caar_tbl[[sn]][[i]]
      cat(sprintf("**Group: %s**\n\n", grp))
      print(knitr::kable(stat_tbl, digits = 4))
      cat("\n")
    }
  }
}
```

## AI Result Interpretation {.ai-section}

```{r result-interpretation, results='asis'}
if (!is.null(ai$result_interpretation)) {
  cat(ai$result_interpretation)
} else {
  cat("*Result interpretation not generated.*")
}
```

## Model Diagnostics

```{r diagnostics-table, results='asis'}
if ("model" %in% names(task$data_tbl) && !is_panel) {
  diag_data <- task$data_tbl %>%
    mutate(
      sigma = purrr::map_dbl(model, ~.x$statistics$sigma),
      r2 = purrr::map_dbl(model, ~{
        r2_val <- .x$statistics$r2
        if (is.null(r2_val)) NA_real_ else r2_val
      }),
      dof = purrr::map_dbl(model, ~.x$statistics$degree_of_freedom),
      autocorr = purrr::map_dbl(model, ~{
        ac <- .x$statistics$first_order_auto_correlation
        if (is.null(ac)) NA_real_ else ac
      })
    ) %>%
    select(event_id, firm_symbol, sigma, r2, dof, autocorr)

  knitr::kable(diag_data, digits = 4,
               caption = "Model Fit Statistics by Event")
}
```

```{r diagnostics-tests, results='asis'}
if ("model" %in% names(task$data_tbl) && !is_panel) {
  diag <- tryCatch(EventStudy::model_diagnostics(task), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (!is.null(diag)) {
    diag_display <- diag %>%
      filter(is_fitted == TRUE) %>%
      select(event_id, firm_symbol, shapiro_p, dw_stat, ljung_box_p)
    knitr::kable(diag_display, digits = 4,
                 caption = "Diagnostic Tests (Shapiro-Wilk, Durbin-Watson, Ljung-Box)")
  }
}
```

## AI Test Statistic Guidance {.ai-section}

```{r test-guidance, results='asis'}
if (!is.null(ai$test_guidance)) {
  cat(ai$test_guidance)
} else {
  cat("*Test statistic guidance not generated.*")
}
```

## AI Model Validation {.ai-section}

```{r model-validation, results='asis'}
if (!is.null(ai$model_validation)) {
  cat(ai$model_validation)
} else {
  cat("*Model validation not generated.*")
}
```

```{r cross-sectional-section, results='asis', eval=!is.null(params$cross_sectional)}
cat("\n## Cross-Sectional Analysis\n\n")

cs_result <- params$cross_sectional
if (inherits(cs_result, "es_cross_sectional")) {
  cat(sprintf("- **N:** %d\n", cs_result$n_obs))
  cat(sprintf("- **R-squared:** %.4f\n", cs_result$r_squared))
  cat(sprintf("- **Adj. R-squared:** %.4f\n\n", cs_result$adj_r_squared))
  knitr::kable(cs_result$coefficients, digits = 4,
               caption = "Cross-Sectional Regression Coefficients")
}
```

```{r cross-sectional-ai, results='asis', eval=!is.null(ai$cross_sectional)}
cat("\n### AI Cross-Sectional Interpretation {.ai-section}\n\n")
cat(ai$cross_sectional)
```

## Appendix

```{r appendix, results='asis'}
cat(sprintf("- **Report generated:** %s\n", Sys.time()))
cat(sprintf("- **R version:** %s\n", R.version.string))
cat(sprintf("- **EventStudy version:** %s\n",
            as.character(utils::packageVersion("EventStudy"))))
cat("- **AI sections:** ", paste(names(ai), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("\n*AI-generated sections are marked with a blue sidebar. ",
    "AI interpretations should be reviewed by a domain expert.*\n")
```
